title: Delicious Ukrainian Dumplings
description: A hearty Ukrainian-inspired dish filled with love and warm spices. These dumplings are a perfect comfort food for any occasion.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine flour and warm water. Mix until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5-7 minutes until smooth.
Divide the dough into small pieces and roll out each piece into a thin circle.
Place a tablespoon of the tomato and onion mixture in the center of each dough circle.
Fold the dough over the filling and press the edges together to seal.
Heat the vegetable oil in a large frying pan over medium heat.
Add the dumplings to the pan and cook for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until golden brown.
Serve the dumplings hot with your favorite dipping sauce.
